requirement_compliance.title: Project current Aitri snapshot bug totals into Hub bugsSummary
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 tests passing. TC-001h/e/f verify snapshot total/open/blocking/bySeverity/openIds projection and null behavior; TC-E2E-001h verifies dashboard-ready total/open/resolved fields through the collector-facing projection. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Derive resolved bug count from total minus open
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 tests passing. TC-002h verifies 5 total minus 2 open equals 3; TC-002e verifies 12 total minus 0 open equals 12; TC-002f verifies invalid open > total clamps resolved to zero. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Maintain compatibility for existing active severity consumers
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 tests passing. TC-003h verifies high active bug aliases trigger blocking alert; TC-003e verifies medium active bug aliases trigger warning alert; TC-003f verifies zero active bugs produce no open-bugs alert. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Avoid promising unavailable historical status breakdowns
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3/3 tests passing. TC-004h/e/f verify snapshot-derived summaries expose resolved while not fabricating verified, fixed, or closed fields. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Preserve legacy BUGS.json reader behavior
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4/4 tests passing. TC-005h/e/f verify legacy BUGS.json status and severity breakdown behavior, artifactsDir=spec support, and absent-file null behavior; TC-E2E-005h verifies fallback summary remains available. Zero technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Snapshot bug projection must tolerate missing or partial bugs objects without crashing collection
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-001f verifies missing bugs returns null without throwing. Projection validates field shape and defaults invalid counts to zero.

requirement_compliance.title: Bug projection must remain constant time relative to historical bug record count
requirement_compliance.evidence: Implementation reads aggregate fields only: total, open, blocking, bySeverity, and openIds. It does not iterate historical bug records.

requirement_compliance.title: The feature must include automated tests covering snapshot projection and alert compatibility
requirement_compliance.evidence: Automated tests exist and pass through ./run-tests.sh: 15 node:test cases and 2 targeted Playwright E2E cases. Existing CI triggers on push/pull_request to main, installs dependencies, runs npm test, and runs npm run test:e2e, but it does not run the exact feature runner ./run-tests.sh or include the feature node:test file in package scripts.

requirement_compliance.title: No new daemon, HTTP route, or request logging behavior is introduced
requirement_compliance.evidence: Only lib/collector/snapshot-reader.js projection logic changed. No server, route, scheduler, daemon, or logging file was modified.

requirement_compliance.title: No new filesystem, network, command execution, or user input surface is introduced
requirement_compliance.evidence: The runtime change is a pure in-memory projection of an already parsed snapshot object. Legacy BUGS.json reader behavior is unchanged.
